requirement_topic.en: RCM Mark — Regulatory Compliance Mark for Electrical and Electronic Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: RCM标志——电气和电子设备法规合规标志
requirement_topic.zht: RCM標誌——電氣和電子設備法規合規標誌

summary.en: Electrical equipment supplied in Australia that is within scope of the Electrical Equipment Safety System (EESS) must bear the RCM (Regulatory Compliance Mark). The RCM is a combined mark indicating compliance with both the Australian Communications and Media Authority (ACMA) electromagnetic compatibility / radio-communications requirements and the electrical safety requirements administered by state and territory electrical safety regulators. For grid-tied PV inverters — which are in-scope electrical equipment under state Electrical Safety Acts — the RCM signals that the equipment meets the applicable Australian standard (AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 as amended by Amd 2:2024 for grid connection of energy systems via inverters) and relevant EMC/radio standards. The RCM replaces the former A-Tick (EMC/telecom) and C-Tick marks. Use of the RCM requires: (1) a registered Responsible Supplier on the EESS national database; (2) a declaration of compliance; (3) supporting test evidence to the applicable standards. Note: AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 Amd 2:2024 came into effect 23 August 2025 and is the current version accepted by CEC and DNSPs; no further grid-inverter standard revision has been gazetted as of June 2026.
summary.zh: 在澳大利亚供应的、属于电气设备安全系统（EESS）适用范围的电气设备，须标注RCM（法规合规标志）。RCM是一个组合标志，表明设备同时符合澳大利亚通信和媒体管理局（ACMA）的电磁兼容 / 无线电通信要求，以及各州和领地电气安全监管机构管理的电气安全要求。并网光伏逆变器属于各州《电气安全法》管辖的范围内电气设备，RCM表明设备符合适用的澳大利亚标准（AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 修正案2:2024，适用于通过逆变器并网的能源系统）及相关EMC / 无线电标准。RCM已取代原有的A-Tick（EMC / 电信）和C-Tick标志。使用RCM须满足：（1）在EESS全国数据库中登记注册的责任供应商；（2）合规声明；（3）符合适用标准的测试证据。注：AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 修正案2:2024自2025年8月23日起生效，为CEC及DNSP现行接受版本；截至2026年6月，未有进一步并网逆变器标准修订版本发布。
summary.zht: 在澳大利亞供應的、屬於電氣設備安全系統（EESS）適用範圍的電氣設備，須標注RCM（法規合規標誌）。RCM是一個組合標誌，表明設備同時符合澳大利亞通信和媒體管理局（ACMA）的電磁相容 / 無線電通信要求，以及各州和領地電氣安全監管機構管理的電氣安全要求。併網光伏逆變器屬於各州《電氣安全法》管轄的範圍內電氣設備，RCM表明設備符合適用的澳大利亞標準（AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 修正案2:2024，適用於通過逆變器併網的能源系統）及相關EMC / 無線電標準。RCM已取代原有的A-Tick（EMC / 電信）和C-Tick標誌。使用RCM須滿足：（1）在EESS全國數據庫中登記注冊的責任供應商；（2）合規聲明；（3）符合適用標準的測試證據。注：AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 修正案2:2024自2025年8月23日起生效，為CEC及DNSP現行接受版本；截至2026年6月，未有進一步並網逆變器標準修訂版本發布。

standards_or_laws: Radiocommunications Act 1992 (Cth) — ACMA EMC/radio compliance framework
Telecommunications Act 1997 (Cth) — ACMA telecommunications compliance framework
State and Territory Electrical Safety Acts (e.g. Electrical Safety Act 2002 (Qld), Electricity Safety Act 1998 (Vic))
AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 — Grid connection of energy systems via inverters (inverter requirements)
AS/NZS CISPR 11 / AS/NZS 4251 — EMC standards (industrial equipment)
EESS (Electrical Equipment Safety System) national framework

summary.en: China has no mark equivalent to the RCM. PV inverters in China are not subject to China Compulsory Certification (CCC / 3C). Chinese manufacturers typically hold voluntary CQC certification or type-test reports to GB/T 37408-2019 (grid-tied PV inverter technical requirements) or GB/T 19964-2024, issued by accredited labs such as CESI (China Electric Power Research Institute) or TÜV Rheinland China. These marks and reports are not recognised by Australian electrical safety regulators or ACMA.
summary.zh: 中国没有等同于RCM的标志。光伏逆变器在中国不属于中国强制认证（CCC / 3C）范围。中国制造商通常持有CQC自愿认证，或由CESI（中国电力科学研究院）、TÜV莱茵中国等认可实验室出具的GB/T 37408-2019（并网光伏逆变器技术要求）或GB/T 19964-2024型式试验报告，上述标志和报告均不被澳大利亚电气安全监管机构或ACMA所认可。
summary.zht: 中國沒有等同於RCM的標誌。光伏逆變器在中國不屬於中國強制認證（CCC / 3C）範圍。中國製造商通常持有CQC自願認證，或由CESI（中國電力科學研究院）、TÜV萊茵中國等認可實驗室出具的GB/T 37408-2019（併網光伏逆變器技術要求）或GB/T 19964-2024型式試驗報告，上述標誌和報告均不被澳大利亞電氣安全監管機構或ACMA所認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — Grid-tied PV inverter technical requirements (voluntary type-test)
GB/T 19964-2024 — Technical requirements for PV power station connected to power system
CQC voluntary certification (not equivalent to RCM)

gap.en: Chinese PV inverter manufacturers do not hold an RCM and are not listed on the EESS national database as a Responsible Supplier. To legally supply grid-tied PV inverters in Australia, the manufacturer or an Australian-registered entity must: (1) register as a Responsible Supplier on the EESS database; (2) obtain third-party test evidence to AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 and applicable EMC standards from a NATA-accredited or equivalent lab; (3) issue an EESS declaration of compliance; and (4) affix the RCM to each unit. CN certification (GB/T, CQC) provides no pathway shortcut — full re-testing to Australian standards is typically required.
gap.zh: 中国光伏逆变器制造商不持有RCM标志，亦未在EESS全国数据库中以责任供应商身份登记注册。如需在澳大利亚合法供应并网光伏逆变器，制造商或在澳注册实体须：（1）在EESS数据库中注册为责任供应商；（2）通过NATA认可或同等实验室获得符合AS/NZS 4777.2:2020及适用EMC标准的第三方测试证据；（3）签发EESS合规声明；（4）在每台产品上标注RCM。中国认证（GB/T、CQC）不提供任何捷径——通常须按澳大利亚标准重新进行全面测试。
gap.zht: 中國光伏逆變器製造商不持有RCM標誌，亦未在EESS全國數據庫中以責任供應商身份登記註冊。如需在澳大利亞合法供應併網光伏逆變器，製造商或在澳註冊實體須：（1）在EESS數據庫中註冊為責任供應商；（2）通過NATA認可或同等實驗室獲得符合AS/NZS 4777.2:2020及適用EMC標準的第三方測試證據；（3）簽發EESS合規聲明；（4）在每台產品上標注RCM。中國認證（GB/T、CQC）不提供任何捷徑——通常須按澳大利亞標準重新進行全面測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RCM is legally required for in-scope electrical equipment supplied in Australia; supply without RCM is an offence under state Electrical Safety Acts and Commonwealth radiocommunications law
mandatory_status.cn: Not mandatory for domestic CN market — no CCC required for PV inverters; voluntary GB/T type-test and CQC only

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Chinese grid-tied PV inverter cannot be legally sold in Australia without the RCM. Obtaining the RCM requires registering an Australian Responsible Supplier on the EESS database, passing testing to AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 (Amd 2:2024 in effect from 23 August 2025) and relevant EMC standards, and maintaining a declaration of compliance. Chinese domestic certifications (GB/T, CQC) do not satisfy this requirement. This information is provided for general reference only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 未标注RCM的中国并网光伏逆变器不得在澳大利亚合法销售。获得RCM须在EESS数据库中注册澳大利亚责任供应商，通过AS/NZS 4777.2:2020（修正案2:2024自2025年8月23日起生效）及相关EMC标准测试，并维护合规声明。中国国内认证（GB/T、CQC）不满足上述要求。本信息仅供一般参考，不构成法律或监管建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 未標注RCM的中國併網光伏逆變器不得在澳大利亞合法銷售。獲得RCM須在EESS數據庫中登記澳大利亞責任供應商，通過AS/NZS 4777.2:2020（修正案2:2024自2025年8月23日起生效）及相關EMC標準測試，並維護合規聲明。中國國內認證（GB/T、CQC）不滿足上述要求。本信息僅供一般參考，不構成法律或監管建議。

requirement_topic.en: EESS Responsible Supplier Registration — Australian National Database
requirement_topic.zh: EESS责任供应商注册——澳大利亚全国数据库
requirement_topic.zht: EESS責任供應商登記——澳大利亞全國數據庫

summary.en: The Electrical Equipment Safety System (EESS) is the national framework governing the supply of electrical equipment in Australia and New Zealand. Under EESS, any person or company that supplies in-scope electrical equipment in Australia must be registered as a Responsible Supplier on the EESS national online database (administered via eess.gov.au; the EESS Platform launched October 2024 replaced the old erac.gov.au database). The Responsible Supplier is the legal entity accountable for the equipment's compliance — this may be the manufacturer, importer, or distributor, but must be an entity with a legal presence able to be contacted by Australian regulators. The Responsible Supplier must: (a) hold a declaration of compliance and supporting technical evidence for each equipment model supplied; (b) ensure the equipment meets applicable Australian standards; (c) affix the RCM mark (required for all Level 3 equipment per AS/NZS 4417.1 and AS/NZS 4417.2); and (d) respond to regulator enquiries and recall obligations. Grid-tied PV inverters are classified as Level 3 (high-risk) equipment under AS/NZS 4417.2, requiring the highest level of evidence: a Certificate of Conformity from a JAS-ANZ-accredited certifier. EESS is administered jointly by the electrical safety regulators of all Australian states and territories, co-ordinated through the Electrical Regulatory Authorities Council (ERAC).
summary.zh: 电气设备安全系统（EESS）是管理澳大利亚和新西兰电气设备供应的全国性框架。根据EESS规定，任何在澳大利亚供应适用范围内电气设备的个人或公司，须在EESS全国在线数据库（通过eess.gov.au管理；EESS平台于2024年10月取代原erac.gov.au数据库）中注册为责任供应商。责任供应商是对设备合规性负法律责任的实体——可以是制造商、进口商或分销商，但须为可被澳大利亚监管机构联系的具有合法存在的实体。责任供应商须：（a）为所供应的每款设备型号持有合规声明及支撑技术证据；（b）确保设备符合适用的澳大利亚标准；（c）标注RCM标志（依据AS/NZS 4417.1和AS/NZS 4417.2，所有三级设备须标注RCM）；（d）回应监管机构询问并履行召回义务。并网光伏逆变器依据AS/NZS 4417.2被划分为三级（高风险）设备，需要最高级别的证据：由JAS-ANZ认可的认证机构颁发的合规证书。EESS由澳大利亚所有州和领地的电气安全监管机构共同管理，通过电气监管机构委员会（ERAC）协调。
summary.zht: 電氣設備安全系統（EESS）是管理澳大利亞和新西蘭電氣設備供應的全國性框架。根據EESS規定，任何在澳大利亞供應適用範圍內電氣設備的個人或公司，須在EESS全國在線數據庫（通過eess.gov.au管理；EESS平台於2024年10月取代原erac.gov.au數據庫）中登記為責任供應商。責任供應商是對設備合規性負法律責任的實體——可以是製造商、進口商或分銷商，但須為可被澳大利亞監管機構聯繫的具有合法存在的實體。責任供應商須：（a）為所供應的每款設備型號持有合規聲明及支撐技術證據；（b）確保設備符合適用的澳大利亞標準；（c）標注RCM標誌（依據AS/NZS 4417.1和AS/NZS 4417.2，所有三級設備須標注RCM）；（d）回應監管機構詢問並履行召回義務。並網光伏逆變器依據AS/NZS 4417.2被劃分為三級（高風險）設備，需要最高級別的證據：由JAS-ANZ認可的認證機構頒發的合規證書。EESS由澳大利亞所有州和領地的電氣安全監管機構共同管理，通過電氣監管機構委員會（ERAC）協調。

standards_or_laws: EESS (Electrical Equipment Safety System) — national framework, eess.gov.au
Electrical Regulatory Authorities Council (ERAC) — co-ordination body
State Electrical Safety Acts (e.g. Electrical Safety Act 2002 (Qld), Electricity Safety Act 1998 (Vic), Electricity (Consumer Safety) Act 2004 (NSW)) — Responsible Supplier obligations
AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 — referenced standard for grid-inverter Level 3 compliance evidence

summary.en: China has no equivalent to the EESS Responsible Supplier registration for export markets. In China, the manufacturer bears product liability under the Product Quality Law of the People's Republic of China (1993, amended 2018), but there is no national database registration requirement for electrical equipment supplied domestically (aside from CCC for CCC-scope products, which does not include PV inverters). Chinese exporters are not required by Chinese law to register with any foreign country's product safety database before export — this is entirely a destination-country obligation.
summary.zh: 中国没有针对出口市场等同于EESS责任供应商注册的制度。在中国，制造商依据《中华人民共和国产品质量法》（1993年颁布，2018年修订）承担产品责任，但国内供应的电气设备（CCC范围产品除外，而光伏逆变器不在CCC范围内）无需进行全国数据库注册。中国出口商在出口前无需依据中国法律向任何外国产品安全数据库注册——这完全是目的地国的义务。
summary.zht: 中國沒有針對出口市場等同於EESS責任供應商登記的制度。在中國，製造商依據《中華人民共和國產品質量法》（1993年頒布，2018年修訂）承擔產品責任，但國內供應的電氣設備（CCC範圍產品除外，而光伏逆變器不在CCC範圍內）無需進行全國數據庫登記。中國出口商在出口前無需依據中國法律向任何外國產品安全數據庫登記——這完全是目的地國的義務。

standards_or_laws: Product Quality Law of the People's Republic of China (1993, amended 2018) — domestic manufacturer liability only
No CN equivalent to EESS Responsible Supplier registration for export

gap.en: A Chinese PV inverter manufacturer has no EESS Responsible Supplier registration and is therefore not legally permitted to supply equipment in Australia without first registering (directly or through an Australian-based entity acting as Responsible Supplier on their behalf). The registration is equipment-model-specific: each inverter model must be individually listed. Without registration, no RCM can be lawfully affixed and sale is prohibited. This is the primary market-access gate for China-to-Australia PV inverter supply.
gap.zh: 中国光伏逆变器制造商未在EESS注册为责任供应商，因此在未完成注册（直接注册或通过作为其责任供应商的澳大利亚实体）之前，不得合法在澳大利亚供应设备。注册以设备型号为单位：每款逆变器型号须单独列明。未注册则无法合法标注RCM，销售行为被禁止。这是中国向澳大利亚供应光伏逆变器的主要市场准入门槛。
gap.zht: 中國光伏逆變器製造商未在EESS登記為責任供應商，因此在未完成登記（直接登記或通過作為其責任供應商的澳大利亞實體）之前，不得合法在澳大利亞供應設備。登記以設備型號為單位：每款逆變器型號須單獨列明。未登記則無法合法標注RCM，銷售行為被禁止。這是中國向澳大利亞供應光伏逆變器的主要市場準入門檻。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EESS Responsible Supplier registration is a legal prerequisite for supplying in-scope electrical equipment in Australia; non-registration is an offence under state Electrical Safety Acts
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent mandatory registration — domestic CN supply of PV inverters does not require registration on any product safety database

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No Chinese PV inverter can be legally supplied in Australia without a registered Responsible Supplier on the EESS national database (eess.gov.au — the EESS Platform replaced the old erac.gov.au registration database in October 2024). The Responsible Supplier must be a legal entity with an ABN contactable by Australian regulators, and must hold model-level compliance evidence to Australian standards. This information is provided for general reference only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 未在EESS全国数据库中注册责任供应商的中国光伏逆变器，不得在澳大利亚合法供应（eess.gov.au——EESS平台于2024年10月取代原erac.gov.au注册数据库）。责任供应商须为持有澳大利亚商业号码（ABN）、可被澳大利亚监管机构联系的法律实体，并须持有符合澳大利亚标准的逐型号合规证据。本信息仅供一般参考，不构成法律或监管建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 未在EESS全國數據庫中登記責任供應商的中國光伏逆變器，不得在澳大利亞合法供應（eess.gov.au——EESS平台於2024年10月取代原erac.gov.au登記數據庫）。責任供應商須為持有澳大利亞商業號碼（ABN）、可被澳大利亞監管機構聯繫的法律實體，並須持有符合澳大利亞標準的逐型號合規證據。本信息僅供一般參考，不構成法律或監管建議。

requirement_topic.en: Declared / Prescribed Electrical Article Classification and State Electrical Safety Regulator Approval
requirement_topic.zh: 申报 / 规定电气产品分级与各州电气安全监管机构审批
requirement_topic.zht: 申報 / 規定電氣產品分級與各州電氣安全監管機構審批

summary.en: Under the EESS framework and state Electrical Safety Acts, electrical equipment is classified into risk-based levels defined in AS/NZS 4417.2. Grid-tied PV inverters fall under Level 3 (high-risk) classification. Level 3 equipment requires the highest evidentiary standard: a Certificate of Conformity issued by a JAS-ANZ-accredited certifier (or laboratory accredited under a mutual recognition agreement, such as IECEE CB Scheme participants) demonstrating compliance with the nominated Australian standard (AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 Amd 2:2024 for grid-connected inverters, mandatory from 23 August 2025). All Level 3 in-scope electrical equipment offered for sale must be registered by a Responsible Supplier with the EESS and be marked with the RCM in accordance with AS/NZS 4417.1. The Responsible Supplier must lodge the declaration of compliance and test evidence with the EESS database before supply. State electrical safety regulators (e.g. Energy Safe Victoria, Electrical Safety Office Queensland, SafeWork NSW) have enforcement powers including product recall, prohibition notices, and prosecution. Grid-tied PV inverters must also comply with network connection requirements set by the Australian Energy Market Operator (AEMO) and Distribution Network Service Providers (DNSPs) under AS/NZS 4777.1:2024 (mandatory from 23 February 2025) and relevant grid codes — these are separate from the product safety EESS pathway but are a parallel market-access requirement.
summary.zh: 根据EESS框架和各州《电气安全法》，电气设备按AS/NZS 4417.2定义的风险等级分类。并网光伏逆变器属于三级（高风险）设备。三级设备要求最高级别的证据：由JAS-ANZ认可的认证机构（或在相互承认协议下认可的实验室，如IECEE CB计划参与实验室）颁发的合规证书，证明符合指定澳大利亚标准（AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 修正案2:2024，适用于并网逆变器，自2025年8月23日起强制执行）。所有在售三级电气设备须由责任供应商在EESS注册，并按AS/NZS 4417.1要求标注RCM。责任供应商须在供应前向EESS数据库提交合规声明和测试证据。各州电气安全监管机构（如维多利亚州Energy Safe Victoria、昆士兰州电气安全办公室、新南威尔士州安全工作局）拥有执法权力，包括产品召回、禁止通知和起诉。并网光伏逆变器还须符合澳大利亚能源市场运营商（AEMO）及配电网络服务提供商（DNSP）依据AS/NZS 4777.1:2024（自2025年2月23日起强制执行）和相关电网规范设定的并网要求——这些要求与产品安全EESS路径分离，但属于并行的市场准入要求。
summary.zht: 根據EESS框架和各州《電氣安全法》，電氣設備按AS/NZS 4417.2定義的風險等級分類。併網光伏逆變器屬於三級（高風險）設備。三級設備要求最高級別的證據：由JAS-ANZ認可的認證機構（或在相互承認協議下認可的實驗室，如IECEE CB計劃參與實驗室）頒發的合規證書，證明符合指定澳大利亞標準（AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 修正案2:2024，適用於併網逆變器，自2025年8月23日起強制執行）。所有在售三級電氣設備須由責任供應商在EESS登記，並按AS/NZS 4417.1要求標注RCM。責任供應商須在供應前向EESS數據庫提交合規聲明和測試證據。各州電氣安全監管機構（如維多利亞州Energy Safe Victoria、昆士蘭州電氣安全辦公室、新南威爾士州安全工作局）擁有執法權力，包括產品召回、禁止通知和起訴。併網光伏逆變器還須符合澳大利亞能源市場運營商（AEMO）及配電網絡服務提供商（DNSP）依據AS/NZS 4777.1:2024（自2025年2月23日起強制執行）和相關電網規範設定的併網要求——這些要求與產品安全EESS路徑分離，但屬於並行的市場準入要求。

standards_or_laws: EESS Equipment Levels framework — eess.gov.au (Level 1 / 2 / 3 classification)
State Electrical Safety Acts and Regulations (e.g. Electrical Safety Regulation 2013 (Qld), Electricity Safety (Equipment) Regulations 2009 (Vic))
AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 — Grid connection of energy systems via inverters — Inverter requirements (Level 3 evidence standard)
AS/NZS 4777.1:2024 — Grid connection of energy systems via inverters — Installation requirements (mandatory from 23 February 2025, supersedes 2016 edition)
AEMO — Technical Requirements for Sub-5 MW DER Connections (September 2024, current version for DER connection technical requirements)
IECEE CB Scheme — mutual recognition of test reports from CB-scheme accredited labs

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for PV inverters are set by the National Energy Administration (NEA) and grid operators (State Grid Corporation of China, China Southern Power Grid) under GB/T 37408-2019 and GB/T 19964-2024. Chinese inverters sold domestically must pass grid-connection type-test by a CESI-accredited lab and obtain a grid-connection permit from the local grid company. This is a domestic grid utility approval, not a product safety classification system. There is no Chinese equivalent of the EESS risk-level classification or the state-by-state electrical safety regulator approval pathway.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器的并网要求由国家能源局（NEA）及电网运营商（国家电网公司、中国南方电网）依据GB/T 37408-2019和GB/T 19964-2024制定。在中国境内销售的逆变器须通过CESI认可实验室的并网型式试验，并从当地电网公司获得并网许可。这是国内电网公司审批，而非产品安全分级制度。中国没有等同于EESS风险等级分类或各州电气安全监管机构审批路径的制度。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器的併網要求由國家能源局（NEA）及電網運營商（國家電網公司、中國南方電網）依據GB/T 37408-2019和GB/T 19964-2024制定。在中國境內銷售的逆變器須通過CESI認可實驗室的併網型式試驗，並從當地電網公司獲得併網許可。這是國內電網公司審批，而非產品安全分級制度。中國沒有等同於EESS風險等級分類或各州電氣安全監管機構審批路徑的制度。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — Grid-tied PV inverter technical requirements (CN domestic grid-connection type-test)
GB/T 19964-2024 — Technical requirements for PV power station connected to power system
State Grid / Southern Grid — domestic grid-connection permit (utility approval, not equivalent to EESS)

gap.en: Chinese PV inverter manufacturers hold domestic CN grid-connection type-test certificates that are not recognised in Australia. To meet the Australian Level 3 / declared article standard, a separate third-party test to AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 by a NATA-accredited or IECEE CB-scheme accredited laboratory is required. Additionally, the inverter must separately satisfy AEMO and DNSP grid-connection technical requirements before it can be connected to the Australian grid — a parallel approval process beyond the EESS product safety pathway. Both tracks must be completed; completing only one does not authorise supply.
gap.zh: 中国光伏逆变器制造商持有在澳大利亚不被认可的国内并网型式试验证书。为满足澳大利亚三级 / 申报产品标准，须由NATA认可或IECEE CB计划认可的实验室对AS/NZS 4777.2:2020进行单独的第三方测试。此外，逆变器在接入澳大利亚电网之前，还须单独满足AEMO和DNSP的并网技术要求——这是EESS产品安全路径之外的并行审批流程。两条路径均须完成，仅完成其中一条不足以授权供应。
gap.zht: 中國光伏逆變器製造商持有在澳大利亞不被認可的國內併網型式試驗證書。為滿足澳大利亞三級 / 申報產品標準，須由NATA認可或IECEE CB計劃認可的實驗室對AS/NZS 4777.2:2020進行單獨的第三方測試。此外，逆變器在接入澳大利亞電網之前，還須單獨滿足AEMO和DNSP的併網技術要求——這是EESS產品安全路徑之外的並行審批流程。兩條路徑均須完成，僅完成其中一條不足以授權供應。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Level 3 / declared article classification requires third-party test evidence to AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 lodged with EESS before supply; AEMO/DNSP grid-connection approval is a separate mandatory parallel requirement
mandatory_status.cn: Not directly equivalent — CN domestic grid-connection type-test (GB/T 37408-2019 via CESI) is mandatory for CN market but not recognised in Australia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Grid-tied PV inverters are classified as Level 3 / high-risk electrical equipment under the EESS framework (AS/NZS 4417.2), requiring a Certificate of Conformity from a recognised certifier plus a registered Responsible Supplier and RCM, before legal supply in Australia. The CEC requires a JAS-ANZ-accredited certifier's certificate to AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 Amd 2:2024. Chinese domestic type-test certificates (GB/T 37408-2019) are not a substitute. A parallel grid-connection approval from AEMO and the relevant DNSP is also required for grid connection. Both the product safety (EESS) and grid-connection tracks must be completed. This information is provided for general reference only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 并网光伏逆变器在EESS框架下（AS/NZS 4417.2）被归类为三级 / 高风险电气设备，须由认可认证机构颁发合规证书，并完成责任供应商注册和RCM标注，方可在澳大利亚合法供应。CEC要求由JAS-ANZ认可的认证机构颁发符合AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 修正案2:2024的证书。中国国内型式试验证书（GB/T 37408-2019）不可替代上述要求。并网还须获得AEMO和相关DNSP的并行并网审批。产品安全（EESS）和并网两条路径均须完成。本信息仅供一般参考，不构成法律或监管建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 併網光伏逆變器在EESS框架下（AS/NZS 4417.2）被歸類為三級 / 高風險電氣設備，須由認可認證機構頒發合規證書，並完成責任供應商登記和RCM標注，方可在澳大利亞合法供應。CEC要求由JAS-ANZ認可的認證機構頒發符合AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 修正案2:2024的證書。中國國內型式試驗證書（GB/T 37408-2019）不可替代上述要求。併網還須獲得AEMO和相關DNSP的並行併網審批。產品安全（EESS）和併網兩條路徑均須完成。本信息僅供一般參考，不構成法律或監管建議。
